heading: Vector Embeddings
body:
The vector embeddings for the `fullplot` field and the example query against
the `fullplot` field in the `sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection were
created using the Voyage AI API (Application Programming Interface) keys. The embeddings for the field and the
query text against the field use the model, `voyage-4`, specified in the
index definition for the field. You can use any [embedding model](avs-key-concepts) in the query.

To learn how to automatically generate vector embeddings for your data and
natural language queries against your data, see [How to Automatically Generate Embeddings](avs-auto-embeddings).
